title: Module 7.2: Venue Assessment & Fire Safety
subtitle: Comprehensive Venue Evaluation and Fire Safety Management
description: Master venue assessment techniques and fire safety requirements for live events. Learn to evaluate means of egress, conduct fire safety inspections, select appropriate fire extinguishers, and implement comprehensive fire safety plans that comply with NFPA standards and local codes.
learning_objectives: Evaluate means of egress for compliance and adequacy
Identify and classify fire hazards by type
Select appropriate fire extinguishers for different fire classes
Implement fire watch procedures and fire safety plans
Navigate NFPA codes and local fire safety requirements

badge.name: Venue & Fire Safety Specialist
badge.description: Mastered venue assessment and fire safety management

research_alignment.interactive_design: Interactive venue walkthroughs with hotspot identification
